# dynamodb-toolkit-koa

> Koa adapter for `dynamodb-toolkit` v3. Mounts the standard REST route pack as Koa middleware — same wire contract as `dynamodb-toolkit/handler`, translated for `(ctx, next)`.

Zero runtime deps; `koa` and `dynamodb-toolkit` are peer dependencies.

## Install

```sh
npm install dynamodb-toolkit-koa dynamodb-toolkit koa
```

## Entry

```js
import {createKoaAdapter} from 'dynamodb-toolkit-koa';
```

## Quick start

```js
import Koa from 'koa';
import mount from 'koa-mount';
import {Adapter} from 'dynamodb-toolkit';
import {createKoaAdapter} from 'dynamodb-toolkit-koa';

const adapter = new Adapter({client, table: 'planets', keyFields: ['name']});
const app = new Koa();
app.use(mount('/planets', createKoaAdapter(adapter)));
app.listen(3000);
```

## Links

- Parent toolkit: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit
- Route pack + envelope reference: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit/wiki/HTTP-handler
- Extended reference: `llms-full.txt`
